---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

:::: {style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem;"}
![](images/behnam-gholami.jpg){style="border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);" width="219"}

::: contact-block
**Name:** Behnam Gholami\
**Email:** [bg24306\@essex.ac.uk](mailto:BL19622@essex.ac.uk){.email}
:::
::::

{{< include _disclaimer.qmd >}}
